title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF EBUS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO SAN VICENTE, MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO SAN VICENTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 221 / 65 OG No. 6, 1268 (February 10, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4891, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF EBUS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARRIO SAN VICENTE, MUNICIPALITY OF GUAGUA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO SAN VICENTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Ebus Elementary School in Barrio San Vicente, Municipality of Guagua, Province of Pampanga, is hereby changed to and shall hereafter be known as San Vicente Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1967.
